title: parasenecio koualapensis
intro: Parasenecio koualapensis is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae, native to Hawaii. It is commonly known as Kouala Pau and has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and wounds, and to reduce fever and alleviate pain. To utilize its medicinal properties, Parasenecio koualapensis can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or applied topically as an ointment or poultice.
